registerService(ICSLService, Json, boolean) - Static method in class com.csl.intercom.jsoncmd.JServiceLoader
Create an api for the registered service with a set of commands to do so: it do the following: - Adds the service name to the list of services - Calls the init function of the service - Adds the service commands - Registers the api in the CSLInterModuleCommunicationManager
